# Alchemy Investments RE

## About
Alchemy Investments RE is a licensed real estate investment brokerage serving the Las Vegas metropolitan area. We buy houses for cash, helping homeowners sell fast without repairs, fees, or commissions.

## Services
- Cash home buying: We purchase homes as-is, in any condition, for fair cash offers
- Fast closings: Close in as little as 7-14 days, or on your timeline
- No fees or commissions: We cover all closing costs
- Free no-obligation cash offers: Get an offer within 24 hours

## Business Information
- **Business Name:** Alchemy Investments RE
- **Website:** https://alchemyinvestmentsre.com
- **Phone:** (702) 718-6934
- **Email:** offers@alchemyinvestmentsre.com
- **Address:** 8978 Spanish Ridge, Las Vegas, NV 89148
- **License:** Nevada Real Estate License S.0184768
- **Hours:** Available 7 days a week

## Service Areas
Las Vegas, Henderson, North Las Vegas, Summerlin, Enterprise, Paradise, Pahrump, Boulder City, Green Valley, Spring Valley (Nevada)

## Why Sellers Choose Us
- No repairs required — we buy in as-is condition
- No agent commissions or hidden fees
- Cash offers, not contingent on financing
- Flexible closing dates to match your schedule
- Any situation: foreclosure, divorce, inherited property, relocation, downsizing, distressed property
